hero.label: Professional portfolio
hero.name: Esteban Andrés Rivera Novillo
hero.title: Software Developer | Technical Operations, Automation & Electronics
hero.description: Electronics and Automation Engineer with experience in technical operations, support, maintenance, and software development. Focused on React, TypeScript, automation, and digital solutions oriented to efficiency, analysis, and problem solving.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Professional with a background in electronics and automation, with experience in technical maintenance, operational follow-up, academic instruction, and digital solution development. I combine software, operations, and electronics perspectives to solve problems, optimize processes, and build useful tools for technical and business environments.

bullets: Follow-up of preventive and corrective maintenance activities in low- and medium-voltage systems, power plant equipment, battery banks, generator sets, and related systems.
Preparation of technical reports and support in preventive maintenance planning.
Technical phone support and incident assistance in an operations support environment.
Coordination and monitoring of alarms and interventions related to telecommunications equipment, microwave systems, and air conditioning units.
Tutoring in Mathematics and Physics for primary and high school students.
Design and delivery of educational robotics workshops for children and teenagers.
Development of communication, content structuring, and personalized guidance skills.
